title: fraxinus pennsylvanica var. cubensis
intro: Fraxinus pennsylvanica var. cubensis, commonly known as the Cuban ash, is a variety of deciduous tree native to Cuba and the southeastern United States. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus pennsylvanica var. cubensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune system function.
